resources.string:
## Sauvegarde des Clés et Conseils de Sécurité 

Votre compte est sécurisé par une clé secrète. La clé est une longue séquence de caractères commençant par **nsec1**. Toute personne ayant accès à cette clé secrète peut publier et modifier votre identité. 

- Ne saisissez **pas** votre clé secrète sur un site web ou un logiciel auquel vous ne faites pas confiance. 
- Les développeurs d'Amethyst ne vous demanderont **jamais** votre clé secrète. 
- **Faites** une sauvegarde sécurisée de votre clé secrète pour la récupération de votre compte. Nous vous recommandons d'utiliser un gestionnaire de mots de passe.
Clé secrète (nsec) copiée dans le presse-papiers
La pubkey de l\'événement n\'est pas égale à l\'utilisateur connecté
Se déconnecter supprime toutes vos informations locales. Assurez-vous que vos clés privées soient sauvegardées afin d\'éviter de perdre votre compte. Voulez-vous continuer ?

Pour plus de sécurité, vous pouvez chiffrer votre clé avec un mot de passe. Cette clé commence par **ncryptsec1** et ne peut être utilisée sans votre mot de passe. \n\nSi vous perdez votre mot de passe, vous ne pourrez pas récupérer votre clé.
mot de passe pour ouvrir la clé
Le mot de passe est nécessaire.
Impossible de chiffrer votre clé privée
La biométrie n\'a pas réussi à authentifier le propriétaire du téléphone
La biométrie n\'a pas réussi à authentifier le propriétaire de ce téléphone. Erreur : %1$s
Pourquoi ne pas explorer un peu votre application Nostr préférée ?
" aimerait avoir la permission de lire votre clé publique et de signer des évènements en votre nom"

## Se connecter à travers Tor avec Orbot 

1. Installe [Orbot](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.torproject.android) 
2. Démarre Orbot 
3. Dans Orbot, vérifie le port Socks. Par défaut 9050 
4. Si nécessaire change le port dans Orbot 
5. Configure le port Socks sur cet écran 
6. Appuyer sur le bouton Activer pour utiliser Orbot comme proxy

1. Install [Orbot](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.torproject.android) 
2. Start Orbot 
3. In Orbot, check the Socks port. The default uses 9050 
4. If necessary change the port in Orbot 
5. Configure the Socks port in this screen 
6. Press the Activate button to use Orbot as a proxy
Vos données seront immédiatement transférées sur le réseau normal
Run Tor directly inside the app. No external app required.
Impossible de se connecter à Tor
Chiffrer les données en utilisant nip 4
Déchiffrer les données en utilisant nip 4
Déchiffrer les données en utilisant nip 44
Chiffrer les données en utilisant nip 44
Réponse dans le chat du groupe de discussion.
Réponse dans le groupe de discussion
Masquer le message de la chaîne
Mettre en sourdine l\'utilisateur de la chaîne
Approbation du post de la communauté
Métadonnées de la liste de relais
Liste des serveurs de stockage de fichiers
Créer ou mettre à jour un étal
Créer ou mettre à jour un produit
Réponse d\'invitation à l\'événement du calendrier
Notifications pour approuver ou rejeter les requêtes Bunker.
Liste des relais de messagerie privés
Description du flux de protocole de base
Mapping Nostr keys to DNS-based internet identifiers
Basic key derivation from mnemonic seed phrase
Capacité window.nostr pour les navigateurs web
Recommandé pour la plupart des personnes. Cela minimisera le nombre d\'interruptions pendant l\'utilisation de l\'application.

Recommandé pour les personnes soucieuses de la vie privée qui souhaitent contrôler chaque application. Choisir ceci vous demandera de définir une préférence chaque fois que vous essayerez une nouvelle application.
Devrais-je approuver automatiquement les événements nostr ou souhaitez-vous les examiner pour chaque application ?
Ces mots vous permettent de recréer votre compte en cas de perte d\'accès. Notez-les dans un endroit sûr
Afficher les mots de la seed
Enter each word of your seed phrase in order. You can also paste the full phrase using the clipboard button.
Use a different index if this mnemonic was used to create multiple accounts (m/44\'/1237\'/%1$d\'/0/0)

Recommandé pour les personnes soucieuses de la vie privée qui voudraient avoir le contrôle de chaque permission. Choisir ceci vous demandera de définir une préférence chaque fois que vous recevez une nouvelle permission.
Je fais entièrement confiance à cette application
Échec de l\'envoi de l\'événement au relais
This option allow to add a nsecbunker manually, and use with whichever app supports Nostr Connect (NIP-46)
If your app offers you a Nostr Connect QR Code you can scan it from here. Usually this login mode it is offered by web apps.
If your app offers you a Nostr Connect URL, you can paste it here. Usually this login mode it is offered by web apps.

Usually Nostr applications have a “Login with Amber” option that permits to use Amber as external signer; when you press that button Amber is launched and you are asked to approve some permissions.\n\nBut you have other options to use Amber:

## IMPORTANT SECURITY NOTICE

You are about to export **ALL** your Amber accounts. This file will contain your private keys.

- **Password protect** your export file with a strong password
- **Store securely** - treat this like your wallet
- **Never share** with anyone
- **Delete** from your device after storing safely

**Anyone with access to this file can control ALL your accounts!**
Password must be at least 8 characters
You are about to export %d accounts to an encrypted file.
This file will contain all your private keys. Store it securely!
This password encrypts your keys before uploading. You will need it to restore.
Password is required to backup or restore
Save each account\'s encrypted key directly to Google Drive. No API key required.
Each account is saved as its own {npub}.ncryptsec file. Android will ask where to save each one — choose Google Drive to send directly without storing anything on this device.
Some accounts could not be saved. Check your connection.
Enter the npub of the account to restore
Upload your encrypted backup to any WebDAV server (Nextcloud, ownCloud, etc.).
To create a new nsecbunker you need to give it a name and select one or more relays, that’s all!
Use this url in your app:
Manage the app permissions by temporarily disabling or completely reverting them. New permission are added by the app when required.
To create a new nsecbunker you need to give it a name and select one or more relays, that’s all!
Notifications are needed to use Amber as a nsec bunker.
%1$s is requiring some permissions, please review them.
Is requiring some permissions, please review them.
%1$s is requiring to sign these events related to %2$s permission.
Relay does not support retrieving Bunker events. Would you like to add it anyway?
Manage the relays used to fetch your profile data
Manage the relays used for communicating with external applications
You will find it in your account section, so you don’t need to copy it right now.
Please add a nickname, later you will able to personalise your full profile (bio, pic, etc) using your preferred Nostr client:
Setup Amber with your Nostr private key. You can enter different versions: Nsec, Ncryptsec or Hex.\nYou can also scan it from a QR Code.
This is your public key, a sort of username that you can share with anyone to let it find you on Nostr:
Congratulations, your new account is ready!\n

Now you can start using apps that support Amber, when needed Amber will open and ask you to confirm permissions.
In this view you will find all the apps that have active permissions.

Discover all Nostr apps for android at
Close application when accepting or rejecting a permission
Some applications may not work if you try to reuse your bunker URI. Delete this application and create a new one in case the login is not working.
Tap to view and install the update
When enabled, Amber will start its background service automatically after the device boots so remote login and NIP-46 requests keep working.
Choose between stable and beta (pre-release) builds
Updates are not available for this build.
Discover more Nostr apps for android at
Don\'t lose access to your Nostr account! Create a backup
Proxy is not working. Check your proxy settings/application.
Are you sure you want to remove all permissions from this application?
Would you like to replace the existing connection \'%1$s\'? If you replace the existing connection the old application will stop working.
Failed to connect to relay/proxy. Check if you enabled the network permission for Amber
Kill Switch enabled, remote login and profile fetching will not work
Would you like to send the recent crash report to Amber in a DM? No personal information will be shared
Would you like to copy the crash report to your clipboard and open a Client to send it to Amber?
Amber received a malformed nostrsigner request and cannot process it. Please contact the client developer to report this issue.
" wants to encrypt this list of tags with %1$s"
wants to encrypt a list of tags with %1$s
" wants to encrypt this text with %1$s"
wants to encrypt a text with %1$s
" wants to read %1$s from %2$s encrypted content"
" wants to read this list of tags from %1$s encrypted content"
wants to read a list of tags from %1$s encrypted content
" wants to read this text from %1$s encrypted content"
wants to read a text from %1$s encrypted content
Encrypt this list of tags with %1$s
Read this list of tags from %1$s encrypted content
Read this text from %1$s encrypted content
Could not connect to relay. Would you like to add it anyway?
Do not leave the app until the key is generated
Amber is a free and open source project\n
Would you like to send this missing translation report to Amber in a DM? You can edit the message before sending.
Would you like to copy this missing translation report to your clipboard and open a Client to send it to Amber? You can edit the message before sending.
wants to encrypt with NIP-44 v3
wants to read encrypted content with NIP-44 v3
When the whitelist is non-empty, relay client authentication (NIP-42) will only be allowed for relays in the list. Auth requests from other relays will be rejected automatically.

One or more accounts could not be loaded because your device's secure storage (KeyStore) returned an error:

%1$s

This is a known firmware bug on some devices where the system cannot upgrade stored encryption keys.

What you can do:
• If you have your nsec (private key) backed up, log out of the affected account and log back in — this will create a new working key.
• Check for a system firmware update from your device manufacturer, which may fix this.
• Do not uninstall Amber; keeping the app installed preserves the possibility of recovery if a firmware update is released.
Too many requests from %1$s — ignoring for now
When enabled, Amber publishes an encrypted copy of your connected applications and their permissions to relays once a day so you can restore them on a new device. Only you can decrypt the backup.
Permissions for applications that already exist on this device will be replaced with the backed-up permissions. New applications from the backup will be added. Continue?
Found an encrypted applications backup with %1$d applications and %2$d permissions. Restore now?
